scoring_rubric: clarity / specificity / emotional_trigger / cta_strength on 0-10 each; composite is the average

primary_text.text: Three decades in the same Springfield shop. ASE-certified technicians, Tesla-capable, and the only place around Eugene where the work outlives the paint job. Precision craftsmanship — every car, every time.
Blue Rose Auto. 30+ years of hands-on work on every kind of vehicle that's rolled into Eugene — daily drivers, lifted trucks, Teslas, classics. One shop. One standard. No shortcuts.
When other shops can't (or won't) take the job, it ends up here. ASE-certified technicians. Tesla-capable bay. Built on 30 years of doing it right the first time.

headlines.text: Built to Outlast the Paint Job

Before. After. The same Tesla.
Eugene's nicest cars get their finish here.
PPF that stays invisible. Until the rock hits.

primary_text.text: Swipe to see what 14 hours of ceramic looks like on a Porsche 911 — taken in by Blue Rose last week. ASE-certified detailing crew, premium-tier ceramic, finish guaranteed by hand-applied work, not assembly-line speed. Send us your vehicle photos for a free quote.

PPF. Ceramic coating. Custom paint. Wraps. Window tint. Every premium cosmetic service Eugene's auto enthusiasts need, in one Springfield shop with 30 years of practice. Tap below and send us photos — we'll quote you in 24 hours.
The difference between a $200 wash and Blue Rose's ceramic isn't 6 weeks. It's 6 years. ASE-certified application, premium tier materials, hand-finish only. Get a quote in 24 hours.

hooks: Your Tesla deserves better than the dealer wait.
Tesla paint is thinner than you think. Here's how we protect it.
We've serviced more Teslas in Springfield than anyone.
Diagnostics, ceramic, PPF — one Tesla-capable shop in Eugene.
Stop driving to Portland for Tesla service.

primary_text.text: Tesla service shouldn't mean a 2-week dealer wait. Blue Rose has been Tesla-capable since the Model S launched — diagnostics, paint protection film, ceramic coating, suspension. ASE-certified, Springfield-based, 30+ years on every kind of vehicle. Book a slot below.

Tesla paint is some of the thinnest factory paint on the road — every rock chip is permanent unless it's protected. Blue Rose has been applying PPF and ceramic to Tesla owners across Eugene + Springfield for years. Send us your VIN, get a quote in 24 hours.
EV owners — repair, detail, PPF, ceramic, wraps. The only Tesla-capable bay between Eugene and Portland that's also ASE-certified for mechanical work. Get a quote.

primary_text.text: ASE-certified mechanics. 30+ years in Springfield. We'll show you exactly what your car needs — and what it doesn't. Book an inspection below.

Brake job. Engine light. Pre-purchase inspection. Diagnostic. Whatever your car needs, Blue Rose has 30+ years of hands-on practice on every make and model that rolls through Eugene. ASE-certified, no upsell games, Tesla-capable for EV folks too. Book below.

If you've been told you need work and want a second opinion before you spend the money — bring it to Blue Rose. We'll inspect it, show you what's actually wrong, and quote honest. 30+ years in Springfield.
